round_1_rejection_summary: provenance-integrity.yml checked adversary is None + top-level self_attested, but schema places self_attested inside adversary object; the two required checks were mutually exclusive — no P0 self-attested artifact could pass both
residual_limitations: Producer and adversary share Anthropic family — Layer-3 weight independence is tier-level only
Verification by static trace of CI logic, not by executing GitHub Actions runners against fixture artifacts
Workflow's self-attestation exception has no independent stage_id guard — depends on registry-validate.yml which silently skips when schema file absent; no current exploitable path
stage_gate.py --validate-all not audited; certificate-completeness main gate unverified end-to-end
